name: redlineid-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Redline ID: a cross-platform app for the discontinued Hot Wheels id Race Portal (apps/mobile), a shared TypeScript protocol package (packages/protocol), and the original Python tools kept as a reference implementation (python/).

scripts.test: npm run test:identity-tools && npm run test:identity-seed && npm run identity-seed:check && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:identity-tools: cd python/tools && python3 -m unittest test_analyze_mattel_ids.py test_inspect_hwid_apk.py
